title: Real height chart for males
meta_description: Real height chart for males - Gnome : Under 5 ft Dwarf: 5' - under 5'3 Pygmy: 5'3 - under 5'6 Turbomanlet: 5'6 - under 5'9 Manle...
contents:
Gnome : Under 5 ft
Dwarf: 5' - under 5'3
Pygmy: 5'3 - under 5'6
Turbomanlet: 5'6 - under 5'9
Manlet: 5'9 - under 6'
Normie is when you reach 6 ft, if you can't even pass a 6' to normies, they will in some way let you know you aren't at their level...
Normie: 6' - under 6'3
Tallfag: 6'3 - under 6'6
Chad: 6'6 - under 6'9
Megachad: 6'9 - under 7'
7 ft or above is automatically gigachad

Anyone is welcome to make suggestions... some areas may vary by 3 inches in range
